## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --locked --all-targets`
- [ ] Relevant docs, lifecycle, package, and exact-artifact checks pass
- [ ] No transcript, prompt, response, source-code sample, local path, state database, or private evidence was added
